title: Egyptian Auto-Chess Game – Full Feature Polish & Bug Fixes

requirements.summary: Fix App.tsx to render the full Pharaoh's Conquest game instead of the legacy quiz/ecosystem layout
acceptanceCriteria: App.tsx renders the Egyptian auto-chess game UI, not a quiz or ecosystem app
No quiz, header, or unrelated components appear in the rendered app
Main menu screen with 'Pharaoh's Conquest' title and Start Game button is the entry screen
Gameplay screen shows HUD, battle board, shop, synergy panel, and bench

file_operations.description: Replace the quiz app layout (Header, Quiz, Footer) with a game state router that renders MainMenu when not in game mode, and the full auto-chess gameplay screen (GameHUD, BattleBoard, Shop, SynergyPanel, Bench) when in game. Wire useGameState hook to manage game/menu transitions. Remove all imports and references to Header, Quiz, and Footer components.

requirements.summary: Update the HTML page title to 'Pharaoh's Conquest' in English
acceptanceCriteria: No Chinese or unrelated text appears in the HTML title tag

file_operations.description: Change the <title> tag content from the Chinese ecosystem simulation title to 'Pharaoh's Conquest'.

requirements.summary: Implement the MainMenu screen component with Egyptian theming, Start Game button, How to Play button, and desert background
acceptanceCriteria: MainMenu renders with 'Pharaoh's Conquest' heading in Cinzel/serif font
Start Game button transitions the app into gameplay mode
How to Play button opens the HowToPlayModal dialog
Desert background image is visible behind the menu

file_operations.description: Create a new MainMenu component that displays 'Pharaoh's Conquest' as a large Cinzel-font heading, two centered buttons (Start Game and How to Play), and uses the desert background image from frontend/public/assets/generated/egypt-menu-bg.dim_1920x1080.png as a full-screen background. Start Game button calls a callback to transition into game mode. How to Play button opens HowToPlayModal in a dialog state. Use EgyptianPanel for button containers and apply Egyptian color palette (egyptian-gold, egyptian-turquoise) from index.css.

requirements.summary: Remove or replace all empty stub components that belong to prior unrelated apps
acceptanceCriteria: No empty or stub component files remain that are imported by game screens
No plant, animal mesh, or ecosystem components exist in the codebase
Any ControlPanel or StatsPanel used by the game has actual Egyptian-themed content

file_operations.description: Delete the empty ControlPanel.tsx stub file as it is not used by the Egyptian auto-chess game and belongs to a prior unrelated app.
Delete the empty GameScene.tsx stub file as it is not used by the Egyptian auto-chess game and belongs to a prior unrelated app.
Delete the empty StatsPanel.tsx stub file as it is not used by the Egyptian auto-chess game and belongs to a prior unrelated app.
Delete the empty Terrain.tsx stub file as it is not used by the Egyptian auto-chess game and belongs to a prior ecosystem simulation app.
Delete the empty PlantMesh.tsx stub file as it belongs to a prior ecosystem simulation app and has no relevance to the Egyptian auto-chess game.
Delete the empty AnimalMesh.tsx stub file as it belongs to a prior ecosystem simulation app and has no relevance to the Egyptian auto-chess game.
Delete the Header.tsx component as it belongs to the legacy quiz app layout and is no longer used in the Egyptian auto-chess game.
Delete the Footer.tsx component as it belongs to the legacy quiz app layout and is no longer used in the Egyptian auto-chess game.
Delete the Quiz.tsx component as it belongs to the legacy ICT quiz app and is no longer part of the Egyptian auto-chess game.

requirements.summary: Verify and fix unit portrait image paths so all unit cards display correct Egyptian portraits
acceptanceCriteria: All 8 unit types display their portrait images without broken image icons
Portrait paths in units.ts resolve to real files under /assets/generated
Shop and bench unit cards both show correct portraits

file_operations.description: Audit all portraitUrl fields in the unit definitions array and update them to use the correct workspace paths to generated assets. Ensure the following mappings are correct: Ra Priest → /assets/generated/unit-ra-priest.dim_256x256.png, Mummy Warrior → /assets/generated/unit-mummy-warrior.dim_256x256.png, Horus Archer → /assets/generated/unit-horus-archer.dim_256x256.png, Sphinx → /assets/generated/unit-sphinx.dim_256x256.png, Anubis Guard → /assets/generated/unit-anubis-guard.dim_256x256.png, Isis Sorceress → /assets/generated/unit-isis-sorceress.dim_256x256.png, Charioteer → /assets/generated/unit-charioteer.dim_256x256.png, Pharaoh → /assets/generated/unit-pharaoh.dim_256x256.png. Replace any placeholder or broken paths.
